---
title: "Test post"
date: 2025-01-01
categories: [test]
draft: true
---

This is a placeholder draft post. Replace this content with a real article.

## Section heading

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.

### Code example

```rust
fn main() {
    println!("Hello, world!");
}
```

```lean
theorem add_comm (n m : Nat) : n + m = m + n := by
  omega
```

### Math example

Inline math: $e^{i\pi} + 1 = 0$

Display math:

$$
\sum_{n=0}^{\infty} \frac{1}{n!} = e
$$

## Another section

More placeholder content here.
